expectations.text: Identifies the reversed N-channel body diode direction as a critical error ('anode at the drain' should be 'anode at the source')
expectations.evidence: Critical Error 1: 'On an N-channel MOSFET, the body diode runs from drain to source with the anode at the drain.' — correctly flagged with exact quote

expectations.text: Correctly states the fix: body diode runs from source to drain with anode at source
expectations.evidence: Fix: 'On an N-channel MOSFET, the body diode runs from source to drain with the anode at the source.'

expectations.text: Presents findings in a structured report with Critical Errors and Fact-Check Items sections
expectations.evidence: Report has '## Critical Errors', '## Fact-Check Items', and '## Clean' sections with consistent numbered formatting
Findings numbered 1–5 sequentially across Critical Errors and Fact-Check Items without restarting

expectations.text: Offers to apply fixes with options: all, comma-separated IDs, interactive, or skip
expectations.evidence: Report ends with the standard Apply fixes prompt with all four options

notes: Also correctly identified gate discharge path error (gate-to-source, not drain-to-source) as Critical Error 3 — a real error not injected for testing
Correctly left P-channel body diode direction as Clean — no false positive unlike baseline
